steps.title: Identify the dimensions
steps.content: The prism has height $8$ inches and base length $x$ inches. Since the length is $5$ inches more than the width, the width is $x-5$ inches.

steps.title: Use the volume formula
steps.content: Volume is length times width times height: $$V(x)=x(x-5)(8).$$ Reordering the factors gives $$V(x)=8x(x-5).$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: $V(x)=8x(x-5)$, so D is correct. Using $x+5$ would reverse the relationship between length and width.
